evals.prompt: I built a SaaS tool but stopped working on it. It has 50 users and $200/mo MRR. How do I sell it on SideProjectors?
evals.expected_output: Selling checklist with pricing guidance, listing optimization, and safe transaction advice

assertions.name: pricing_guidance
assertions.description: Provides a valuation framework based on revenue multiples (1-3x annual revenue for side projects)

assertions.name: listing_checklist
assertions.description: Covers preparation steps: clean code, gather metrics, write description, add screenshots

assertions.name: no_escrow_warning
assertions.description: Warns that SideProjectors has no escrow and recommends third-party escrow for the transaction

assertions.name: cross_listing
assertions.description: Suggests also listing on other marketplaces like Acquire.com for broader buyer reach

evals.prompt: I just want the DR69 backlink from SideProjectors for SEO. What's the fastest way to get listed?
evals.expected_output: Showcase listing guide focused on getting the backlink with minimal effort

assertions.name: showcase_listing
assertions.description: Recommends a showcase listing (not for-sale) as the path to the backlink

assertions.name: working_product_required
assertions.description: Notes the requirement for a working product with a live URL

assertions.name: dr69_value
assertions.description: Mentions the DR69 do-follow backlink value and how it compares to other directories

assertions.name: multi_directory
assertions.description: Suggests pairing with other high-DR directories (MicroLaunch DR59, LaunchingNext DR51)

evals.prompt: I found a project I want to buy on SideProjectors but I'm worried about getting scammed. How do I protect myself?
evals.expected_output: Due diligence checklist for buying safely on a platform with no escrow

assertions.name: no_escrow_reality
assertions.description: Explains that SideProjectors has no escrow, payment handling, or buyer protection

assertions.name: verification_steps
assertions.description: Recommends specific verification: live demo, analytics access, seller background check

assertions.name: third_party_escrow
assertions.description: Suggests using a third-party escrow service like Escrow.com for transactions over $500

assertions.name: written_agreement
assertions.description: Advises getting a written agreement listing what's included in the sale
